scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n auth-service,profile-service,api-gateway -c blue,green,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter auth-service start:dev" "pnpm --filter profile-service start:dev" "pnpm --filter api-gateway start:dev"
scripts.db:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d redis auth-postgres profile-postgres
scripts.db:migrate:auth: pnpm build:libs && pnpm --filter auth-service exec drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:migrate:profile: pnpm build:libs && pnpm --filter profile-service exec drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:generate:auth: pnpm build:libs && pnpm --filter auth-service exec drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:generate:profile: pnpm build:libs && pnpm --filter profile-service exec drizzle-kit generate
